---
output: hugodown::md_document
title: "The Heart Speaks"
date: 2020-07-27
summary: '"You can pretend you don’t wanna know<br>But I read the signs from your head to your toes<br>Yeah, you don’t need to say a word cause<br>Your body talks"<br>(The Struts, ft. Kesha)'
trailer: "gallery/the-heart-speaks/preview/turmite_22.png"
---

```{r include=FALSE}
source("../../diziet.R")
```

```{r echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
diziet$make_gallery()
```
